prestazioni: Replace the stock 5.0L Windsor (302ci) V8 (engine code: 351W) with a stroked 393ci version using a Scat Enterprises 4.00" stroker crank, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and forged JE Pistons (9.5:1 compression) for a naturally aspirated power target of 500+ hp at the flywheel. Pair with a Holley Sniper EFI 2x4 throttle body system and a custom-tuned Haltech Elite 2500 ECU to optimize fuel and ignition maps for Australian 98 RON fuel.

Upgrade the factory Tremec T5 5-speed manual transmission with a Tremec TKO 600 (2.87:1 first gear) and a McLeod twin-disc RST clutch (rated for 700 lb-ft) to handle increased torque. Install a Ford Motorsport 9-inch differential with a 3.73:1 gear ratio and a Detroit Truetrac limited-slip differential for improved traction.

Replace the stock suspension with a full Pedders Super XA adjustable coilover kit (EB-specific valving) and polybushings for the front control arms. Add a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm) and a rear sway bar (22mm) to reduce body roll. Fit 18x9.5" and 18x10.5" Simmons FR1 wheels with Nitto NT05 tires (255/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear) for optimal grip.
estetica: Install a full EB GT-specific body kit from Rare Spares, including the OEM-style front lip spoiler, side skirts, and rear bumper with integrated diffuser. Replace the stock bonnet with a carbon fiber replica from Seibon Carbon with a functional heat extractor vent for the 393ci build.

Retrofit the interior with a full Recaro SRD-E bucket seat setup (EB-specific mounting brackets) and a Takata 4-point harness. Replace the stock steering wheel with a Nardi Classic 380mm suede wheel and add a custom gauge pod from Speedhut with a 10,000 RPM tachometer, oil pressure, and wideband AFR gauges.

Apply a custom livery using 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the bonnet, roof, and side mirrors. Add EB GT-specific decals from Classic Ford Graphics, including the iconic "GT" stripes in silver and a custom "393W" badge on the front fenders to denote the stroked engine.
